文档场景：上市公司企业年报
page_no: 19
unit_id: p19_b9

source_text:
截至2020年12月31日的內涵價值權益創下新高為671.85億美元，於派付股息19.97億美元之前增加52.77億美元，
current_translation:
As of December 31, 2020, embedded value equity reached a new high of USD 67.185 billion, an increase of USD 5.277 billion before the payment of dividends of USD 1.997 billion,
